faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, We CV is completely free. We offer all core features, including resume creation, editing, AI-powered proofreading, and more, without any cost.
faq.q2: How do I save my resume?
faq.a2: We CV automatically saves your resume to local storage. You can also export your resume as PDF or JSON format at any time for backup and sharing.
faq.a3: Currently, we support Chinese and English. You can switch languages in the top-right corner of the page.
faq.a4: You can reach us at xxx@gmail.com. We'll respond to your questions as soon as possible.
